title: Waifu Villagers
description: Transforms all Minecraft villagers into cute anime waifu models of girls for a fun and aesthetic twist!
body:
#
Before and After Effects
![Before and After Effects](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ff6b66812dffe4aac4edc36d7bf95e6c55936c53.jpeg)
#
Discord
[![Click here to join our discord community](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/200187036214d4fc37425cc6b6a4d84d9273918f_0.webp)](https://discord.gg/R5XUqK8Zwf)
#
Description
⚠️┃Reminder: Please use headphones 😂 😂┃Features: 1. Custom villagers and player death and bow hit sounds 2. Waifu models of Villagers 3. Custom Villager skins based on anime waifus 🚨┃Requirments: 1. To make the resource pack to work properly you should have OPITFINE installed. 2. After OPTIFINE setup: 2.1. make sure to enable "Custom Entity Model" in Options -> Video Settings -> Quality.

❤️ Support the Project

Enjoying this resource pack? Your support helps fund future updates, new features, bug fixes, and the development of more Minecraft projects. Every contribution keeps the work alive and growing.

💳 Payment Options

  • PayPal — supports debit/credit cards and Apple Pay.
  • Ko‑fi — quick and easy donations.

This button will safely redirect you to my official support page hosted on GitHub Pages, which is 100% safe.
